While several elements related to the Alignment and Phasing System (APS) were found—such as the "APS Mission" block, "APS Performance Requirements," and various operational domain views—there are no explicit relationships to elements typed as "actor" or "stakeholder" associated with these components in the current model structure.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Exploration Step 1 identified several APS-related elements, including 'APS Mission' (a block and activity). I will now map the properties of 'APS Mission' to see if it has any relationships to stakeholders or actors.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "APS Mission" .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
}
GROUP BY ?prop
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The previous query for 'APS Mission' properties returned no results, likely due to case sensitivity or exact name matching issues. I will try a broader search for elements containing 'APS' and then check their properties to find potential stakeholders or actors.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>

  ?owner vocab:NamedElement_name ?ownerName .
}
LIMIT 10
